name: presi
description: 1. Go to https://github.com/BChevallier/revealjs_template 2. Press "Use this template" 3. Modify slides (sections) under docs #### localhost presentation 1. Open package.json 2. Run line format 3. Run line dev ### Host with GitHub Pages 1. Go to settings (in GitHub)->Pages and ensure "sources" is set to "GitHub Actions" 2. Check if the build was successful 3. Ensure that "base" in "vite.config.ts" is set to the repository name
